name: maptial

metadata.name: maptial
metadata.summary: Library to calculate density and potential maps from protein structures, and to calculate geoemetric proerties of protein structures.

documentation:
# lib-maptial

## For developers
Create a virtual environment
```
python3 -m venv .env-maps
source .env-maps/bin/activate 
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

modules.name: maptial.xyz.crstransform
documentation:
RSA 25/2/23
This class handles transformations in 3d space from a plabe defined by 3 given points to the origin

modules.name: maptial.xyz.spacetransform
documentation:
RSA 25/2/23
This class handles transformations in 3d space from a plabe defined by 3 given points to the origin

modules.name: maptial.xyz.axestransform
documentation:
RSA 28/2/23
This class handles transformations of a list of values from one fastest-middle-slow to another
eg
1,2,3,4,5,6 -> F,M,S =  3,2,1 -> if pictures as x,y,z

4,5,6
1,2,3

Transform this list so it looks the same, but has been given fastest=Z, M=X,S=Y

modules.name: maptial.xyz.gridmaker
documentation:
RSA 25/2/23
This class handles transformations in 3d space from a plabe defined by 3 given points to the origin

functions.name: maptial.geo.geocalculator.getDistance
documentation:
param: x1,y1,z1= the coordinates of the first atom
param: x2,y2,z2= the coordinates of the second atom
returns: distance between atoms and details of the calculation

functions.name: maptial.geo.geocalculator.getAngle
documentation:
param: x1,y1,z1= the coordinates of the first atom
param: x2,y2,z2= the coordinates of the second atom
param: x3,y3,z3= the coordinates of the third atom
returns: angle between atoms and details of the calculation

functions.name: maptial.geo.geocalculator.getDihedral
documentation:
param: x1,y1,z1= the coordinates of the first atom
param: x2,y2,z2= the coordinates of the second atom
param: x3,y3,z3= the coordinates of the third atom
param: x4,y4,z4= the coordinates of the fourth atom
returns: angle between atoms and details of the calculation

methods.name: maptial.geo.pdbcontacts.ContactMaker.calculateOneGeometry
documentation:
Creates the geoemtry from the structure in the class for 1 geo

```
param chain

The chain id

param rid

The residue number

param geo_atoms

A list of tuples that is the atom, the displacement

returns

[bool,float,bfactor, occupancy, atoms, GeoAtom] a bool for if it could be calculated, and the value, and the reference atom
```

methods.name: maptial.geo.pdbcontacts.ContactMaker.calculateContacts

functions.name: maptial.pol.xinterpolation.trilinear_interpolation_jit
documentation:
Trilinear interpolation (from Wikipedia)

```
param x_volume

x points of the volume grid

type crack_type

list or numpy.ndarray

param y_volume

y points of the volume grid

type crack_type

list or numpy.ndarray

param x_volume

z points of the volume grid

type crack_type

list or numpy.ndarray

param volume

volume

type crack_type

list or numpy.ndarray

param x_needed

desired x coordinate of volume

type crack_type

float

param y_needed

desired y coordinate of volume

type crack_type

float

param z_needed

desired z coordinate of volume

type crack_type

float

return volume_needed

desired value of the volume, i.e. volume(x_needed, y_needed, z_needed)

type volume_needed

float
```

modules.name: maptial.geo.reportmaker
documentation:
GeoHTML (LeucipPy.GeoHTML)
------------------------------------------------------
This class manipulates given dataframes into preformatted html reports using matplotlib.
The class assists in high volume output for visual analysis

param alpha: true
param centres: sets 0 as the middle in the colours (use divergent colour map)
param label: label the contours
param levels: can be number or cohosen list
param mtx: true
param overlay: true
param palette: true
param style: Can be filled, lines or both
param title: true
return: true
---

Class for a single atom

:data outpath:
:data title:

methods.name: maptial.pol.iteration.Iteration.get_score
documentation: implemented interface that is the same for all abstractions

classes.name: maptial.pol.iteration.Straightion
documentation: ## Straight superposition of the given points with no minimising efforts - the difference score is irrelevant as is the "seed"

classes.name: maptial.pol.iteration.Minimation
documentation: In thisd method we are not looking to minimise the difference between the 2, iunstead we are looking to adjust all given points to the nearest maximum and re-align
## This looks for the nearest minima to the given points and adjusts - the difference score is irrelevant as is the "seed"

classes.name: maptial.pol.iteration.Boxion
documentation: ## Boxes algorithm assumes the minimum is nearby and draws smaller boxes - it is using the scoring function against the "seed" to minimise by adjusting the other

classes.name: maptial.pol.iteration.Simplexion
documentation: ## METHODS I DON'T KNOW PLACE HOLDERS - it is using the scoring function against the "seed" to minimise by adjusting the other
## As far as I know it doesn;t minimise the set, only each one against the seed?

http://bigwww.epfl.ch/thevenaz/interpolation/
*******************************************************************************
